mechanism_primary: The error arises from applying the default convention that exponentiation is left-associative (common in some computational contexts), but in standard mathematics, exponentiation is right-associative, so 2^3^4 = 2^(3^4), not (2^3)^4.
audit_notes: Sprint v2 Phase 4. Canary: 1/2. Frontier (anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6): correct. Adversary scores: tef=2, cr=2
